popularStory.headline: Yolande de Hainaut (1175-1219)
popularStory.description:
Yolande de Hainaut, née en 1175 et morte en 1219, est une impératrice latine de Constantinople de 1217 à 1219.

Sa famille

Elle est la fille du comte Baudouin V de Hainaut et de Marguerite Ire (1145- …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople於1175年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯時，她的父親Baudouin V de Hainaut25歲，母親Marguerite D' Alsace Comdesttess De Flanders31歲。她於1193年7月24日與Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople在法國皮卡迪艾斯索頌斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她於1217年被列為appointed regent of the latin empire of constantinople - after arriving there safely by sea 。她去世於1219年8月24日在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾享年44歲，埋葬在法國布格薩o-吉洛易姆a孔可倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople于1175年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德瓦倫希恩斯时，她的父亲Baudouin V de Hainaut25岁，母亲Marguerite D' Alsace Comdesttess De Flanders31岁。她于1193年7月24日与Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople在法国皮卡迪艾斯索頌斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她于1217年被列为appointed regent of the latin empire of constantinople - after arriving there safely by sea 。她去世于1219年8月24日在土耳其易斯坦波爾菲迪易斯坦波爾享年44岁，埋葬在法国布格薩o-吉洛易姆a孔可倫。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Yolanda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin. It is found in Old French as Yolande , of which this is a Latinate form. It may be ultimately of Germanic origin, but if so it has been altered beyond recognition. It is also sometimes identified with the name of St Jolenta ( d. 1298 ), daughter of the king of Hungary.

en.lifeSummary: When Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople was born in 1175, in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Baudouin V de Hainaut, was 25 and her mother, Marguerite D' Alsace Comdesttess De Flanders, was 31. She married Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople on 24 July 1193, in Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 7 daughters. In 1217, at the age of 42, her occupation is listed as appointed regent of the latin empire of constantinople - after arriving there safely by sea . She died on 24 August 1219, in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkiye, at the age of 44, and was buried in Cluny, Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Burgundy, France.

fr.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople est née en 1175, à Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Baudouin V de Hainaut, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Marguerite D' Alsace Comdesttess De Flanders, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople le 24 juillet 1193, à Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 7 filles. En 1217, à l’âge de 42 ans, la profession de sa indiquée est appointed regent of the latin empire of constantinople - after arriving there safely by sea . Elle est décédée le 24 août 1219, à Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquie, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Cluny, Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, France.

de.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople 1175 in Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Baudouin V de Hainaut 25 und ihre Mutter Marguerite D' Alsace Comdesttess De Flanders 31. Sie hat am 24. Juli 1193 in Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Frankreich Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 7 Töchter. 1217, als sie 42 Jahre alt war, war ihr Beruf als appointed regent of the latin empire of constantinople - after arriving there safely by sea  aufgeführt. Sie starb am 24. August 1219 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Türkei und wurde in Cluny, Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople è nata il nel 1175 nel Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Baudouin V de Hainaut, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Marguerite D' Alsace Comdesttess De Flanders, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople il 24 luglio 1193, nel Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 7 figlie. Nel 1217, all'età di 42 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come appointed regent of the latin empire of constantinople - after arriving there safely by sea . Morì il 24 agosto 1219, nel Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turchia, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Cluny, Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinopleが1175年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードベレンシエンスで生まれた時，父Baudouin V de Hainautは25歳，母Marguerite D' Alsace Comdesttess De Flandersは31歳であった。1193年7月24日にフランスピカーディエイスンソイソンスでPierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinopleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。1217年，42歳の時，職業はappointed regent of the latin empire of constantinople - after arriving there safely by sea と記録されている。彼女は1219年8月24日にトルコイスタンブルファティイスタンブルで44歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンサoネ-エト-ロイアームaコンクルニーにて埋葬された。

ko.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이
ko.lifeSummary: Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople(이)가 1175년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 발시네스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Baudouin V de Hainaut(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite D' Alsace Comdesttess De Flanders(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1193년 7월 24일 프랑스 피카디 아이스니 소이손스에서 Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 1217년, 42세의 나이로 그녀의 직업은 appointed regent of the latin empire of constantinople - after arriving there safely by sea 이었다. 그녀는 1219년 8월 24일 튀르키예 이스탠불 팻이h 이스탠불에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 사o니-트-로이르 a콘 클루니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople nasceu em 1175, em Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Baudouin V de Hainaut, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite D' Alsace Comdesttess De Flanders, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople em 24 de julho de 1193, em Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 7 filhas. Em 1217, com 42 anos, sua profissão aparece como appointed regent of the latin empire of constantinople - after arriving there safely by sea . Ela faleceu em 24 de agosto de 1219, em Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquia, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Cluny, Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, França.

ru.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: коуртенеи, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople родилась в 1175 г. в местности веиленсиеннесь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Baudouin V de Hainaut было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite D' Alsace Comdesttess De Flanders, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople 24 июля 1193 г. в местности соиссонс, эисн, пикарди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 7 дочерей. В 1217 году, в возрасте 42 лет,  она работала по профессии appointed regent of the latin empire of constantinople - after arriving there safely by sea . Она умерла 24 августа 1219 г. в местности истанбул, фатих, истанбул, Турция в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности клуни, мaкон, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогн, Франция.

sm.from 1212 to 1216: mai le 1212 e o'o I le 1216

es.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Francia
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Yolanda de Hainaut, Impératrice Latine de Constantinople nació en 1175, en Valenciennes, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Baudouin V de Hainaut, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Marguerite D' Alsace Comdesttess De Flanders, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Pierre de Courtenay Empereur latin de Constantinople el 24 de julio de 1193, en Soissons, Aisne, Picardie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 7 hijas. En 1217, a la edad de 42 años, su ocupación registrada era appointed regent of the latin empire of constantinople - after arriving there safely by sea . Murió el 24 de agosto de 1219, en Istanbul, Fatih, İstanbul, Turquía, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Cluny, Mâcon, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne, Francia.
